heading: Transportation of fugitive by receiving agent
label: 3194 Transportation of fugitive by receiving agent
text: Any agent appointed as provided in who receives the fugitive into his custody is empowered to transport him to the State or Territory from which he has fled.section 3182 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 663 (R.S. § 5279).Last sentence of said section 663, relating to rescue of such fugitive, was omitted as covered by , the punishment provision of which is based on later statutes. (See reviser’s note under that section.)section 752 of this titleMinor changes were made in phraseology.
